mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, behavior_type, create_time FROM user_behavior
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_behavior (user_id, product_id, behavior_type, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{behaviorType}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM user_behavior WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT CASE WHEN u.gender = 0 THEN '女' WHEN u.gender = 1 THEN '男' ELSE '通用' END AS gender, CASE WHEN u.age < 18 THEN 'under18' WHEN u.age BETWEEN 18 AND 25 THEN '18-25' WHEN u.age BETWEEN 26 AND 35 THEN '26-35' WHEN u.age BETWEEN 36 AND 45 THEN '36-45' WHEN u.age BETWEEN 46 AND 55 THEN '46-55' ELSE 'over55' END AS ageRange, SUM(CASE WHEN ub.behavior_type = 'BUY' THEN 5 WHEN ub.behavior_type = 'COLLECT' THEN 3 WHEN ub.behavior_type = 'CLICK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS weight FROM user_behavior ub LEFT JOIN user_info u ON ub.user_id = u.user_id WHERE ub.product_id = #{productId} AND ub.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND u.gender IN (0,1) AND u.age IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gender, ageRange
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_behavior WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND behavior_type IN ('CLICK','COLLECT','BUY')

SELECT p.category, SUM(CASE ub.behavior_type WHEN 'VIEW' THEN 1 WHEN 'CLICK' THEN 1 WHEN 'COLLECT' THEN 3 WHEN 'CART' THEN 3 WHEN 'BUY' THEN 5 ELSE 1 END) AS totalWeight FROM user_behavior ub INNER JOIN product_info p ON ub.product_id = p.product_id WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} AND p.category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY totalWeight DESC
